title: aquilegia ecalcarata f. semicalcarata
intro: Aquilegia ecalcarata f. semicalcarata, also known as the yellow columbine, is a rare, flowering plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Aquilegia ecalcarata f. semicalcarata include its possible ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
